title: canarium engleri
intro: Canarium engleri, also known as the Engler's canarium or Pacific canarium, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Pacific Islands, specifically in the countries of Papua New Guinea and the Solomon Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Canarium engleri include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve wound healing. Canarium engleri can be prepared as a herbal infusion or decoction, often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
